arms.label: Debate-only, bull/bear judge, no forward lock (pending arm b)
Full pipeline (gate + seen-set + triage + bear-case-first + overlap + forward lock)

raw.sampling: seeded, round-stratified, documented, content-hash-verifiable manifest over the 48 non-admitted candidates of the batch-era rounds (H5 discipline: no undocumented membership)

adjudicated.note: every raw-audit FALSE_REJECTION flag escalated to a capital-at-risk re-judge with the full record; all 9 upheld. Secondary resolution figure -- never the headline (H5 discipline).

pilot_undocumented_n14.note: Superseded by the documented n=40 draw: membership was never enumerated or seeded. Kept for historical comparison only -- never reported as primary. This is the exact H5 lesson the design doc bakes into the benchmark protocol.

notes: Arm decisions/prompts: arms a-c (ungated_screener, no_bear_case_first, no_overlap_penalty) are recovered originals from the pilot run journals (src/prompts.md Sec 8a-8c); no_forward_lock and debate_only are freshly-run pending arms under the identical preserved 38-card batch and protocol (RESULTS_V2_WORKING.md). No per-card admit/reject membership is public -- only the aggregate counts, rates, and the H5 audit precision are released.
